title: Shellfish Pilaf
description: A flavorful seafood pilaf dish made with shellfish and served with a side of melty cheese. This is a great option for a seafood lover's dinner.

ingredients.name: Shellfish (such as shrimp, mussels, and clams)
Melty cheese (such as mozzarella or cheddar)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the shellfish and cook until they are pink and fully cooked.
Add the pilaf rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the shellfish and onion mixture.
Stir in the shredded melty cheese until it is melted and the mixture is heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
